title: Blink Charging Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Blink Charging Q1 2026 Earnings Summary. Financial Performance. Revenue & Profitability: Total Q1 revenue: $20.8 million (flat year-over-year), Service revenue: $13.3 million, up 25% YoY, Product revenue: $6.2 million, GAAP net loss: $11.6 million versus $21 million prior year, Non-GAAP net loss: $7.8 million, a 55% improvement. Margins & Efficiency: GAAP gross margin: 32%, Non-GAAP gross margin: 42.4%, up over 200 basis points, Operating expenses: $18.4 million, down 35% YoY, Adjusted EBITDA loss: $5.1 million, improved 64% YoY. Balance Sheet & Cash: Cash and equivalents: $38 million, No debt on balance sheet, Quarterly cash burn: approximately $1.7 million, Net cash from operations: positive $700K versus negative $13M prior year. Strategic Initiatives. DC Fast Charging Buildout: Company plans to deploy 27 sites encompassing 136 stalls, with 3 sites and 11 stalls currently under construction. Business Model Transformation: CEO Michael Battaglia stated recurring and repeatable service revenues grew 25% year over year to $13.3 million. Full-Year 2026 Guidance: Revenue: $105 million to $115 million, GAAP gross margin: approximately 35%, Focus on service revenue scaling and DC fast charging deployment.
